input: user-item interaction graph (distributed across clients) with sensitive user attributes (e.g., gender, age) kept private
output: personalized and fair item recommendations per user
loss: recommendation loss (e.g., BPR) + fairness regularization (group fairness constraint)
key_idea: integrates personalized GNN with fairness constraints and differential privacy in a federated setting to mitigate group bias without exposing sensitive attributes
metrics: group fairness metric (e.g., demographic parity difference)
